rulings.Case Title: DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. MARK WILLIAMS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 6, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT FINANCIAL FREEDOM SENIOR FUNDING CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment is granted. Plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of fact. After Plaintiff obtained the judgment in the first action, it did not record that judgment to protect its priority. Plaintiff's liens merged into the judgment and defendant recorded its interest first. CCP section 697.020 does not apply to the instant case. Subsection (a) applies to attachment liens and subsection (b) applies to liens created under a discrete section of the Code of Civil Procedure, not Civil Code section 1367. =(302/CWW/PB)
